articles.title: MCP Install Friction Is Killing Adoption. We Measured It.
articles.summary: The MCP ecosystem shipped 26 servers last month. Almost nobody installed them. I know because I counted: 11 installs on my most popular server. 61 products. One Chrome extension that removes the install barrier. The problem isn’t quality. It’s the 4-step install: Find npx command Open terminal Edit...
